title: eva sound bytes
wikitext:
[]: eva sound bytes             Quote Post by Bagu » Wed Jan 05, 2011 12:16 pm this might have been brought up, but the search option gave no results. i'm trying to find the sound of the transformer humming sound from within the eva cockpit. that would make some cool white noise for a phone.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Wed Jan 05, 2011 1:33 pm Should be easy to cut it from an episode and loop it. Do you want Rebuild or Original? I think it is the same sound but in higher quality in Rebuild. EDIT: Okay. I'm on it. Might take a while (few hours) as I have to re-acquire 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by Bagu » Wed Jan 05, 2011 1:42 pm Clover wrote: Should be easy to cut it from an episode and loop it. Do you want Rebuild or Original? I think it is the same sound but in higher quality in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jan 06, 2011 8:42 pm Here's a version that is non looped- About 2 seconds- http://www.megaupload.com/?d=YUJSS4OU Here's a looped version that has an editing artifact that sounds like a steady heartbeat. Not sure if you will like that, but I have it nonetheless- http://www.megaupload.com/?d=WAJ8FCYN

[]:             Quote Post by Bagu » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:20 pm Clover wrote: Here's a version that is non looped- About 2 seconds- http://www.megaupload.com/?d=YUJSS4OU Here's a looped version that has an editing artifact that sounds like a steady heartbeat. Not sure if you will like that, but I have it nonetheless- http://www.megaupload.com/?d=WAJ8FCYN

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:23 pm Can someone get me the EoE Shinji scream? I want it as a ringtone.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:26 pm I have a DVD Audio Ripper program and various editing programs, so its pie for me to make soundbytes

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:27 pm MAKE!

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:31 pm so, you want English or Japanese EoE Shinji scream? I ripped both for a delayed fan DVD I was going to make

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:32 pm English, spike spencer gets just the right note with that.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:34 pm okie dokie but yeah, I can make high quality soundbytes (mp3 320 kbts and/or lossless WAV), so anyone can ask me to make soundbytes and i'll grant your wish ASAP

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:36 pm This call for a few eva spoofs. Can you get a few visual shots too, I have a few backlogged AMV's I want to finish.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:44 pm Requesting Japanese version, too.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 10:49 pm Lol, thats doughnuts alright.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Jan 07, 2011 11:50 am I want a compilation of Rei´s little moans looped in episode #23 where she gets taken over by the pulsating ring thingy. And I want an Anta Baka!?! sound rip as well. Doesn´t have to be looped, by the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Jan 07, 2011 1:28 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: I want a compilation of Rei´s little moans looped in episode #23 where she gets taken over by the pulsating ring thingy. And I want an Anta Baka!?! sound rip as well. Doesn´t have to be looped, by the way.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Jan 08, 2011 5:39 am Thanks mate, I appreciate your hard work(although you used MU instead of MF).

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Jan 08, 2011 1:24 pm Guess what my ringtone is.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 08, 2011 1:53 pm Hey, I never got my English scream. I'm so sad now.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Jan 08, 2011 7:38 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Hey, I never got my English scream. I'm so sad now.
